title: Summary: Turn 1005
content: After compilation success and JaCoCo upgrade to 0.8.13 (still incompatible with JDK 25, tests skip JaCoCo), fixed one test but three ObsidianExportServiceTest failures remain: (1) create `Uncategorized` directory on empty KB in `ObsidianExportServiceImpl`, (2) append `()` to `sanitizeFileName` regex `[\\/:*?"<>|()]`, (3) generate `_index.md` for each parent directory segment in subcategory paths.
